meaning: Multiple Function Printer,多功能打印机
examples: In 1995-2004, overall growth was faster, 2.2% a year-but MFP contributed less, 0.3 points.

The new HP Hotspot LaserJet Pro M1218nfs MFP marks another milestone in HP's legacy of innovation.
